---
title: Chat et bizarreries
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557529/chat_20220304_wjcgdy.png
description: Chat et bizarreries
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2022-03-01
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557529/chat_20220304_wjcgdy.png)
